calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir S. Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Steven Baughman, Richard L. Palmer and Larry E. Trefry, who were not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Bondex International, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on April 2, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed September 9, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed August 31, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Steven Baughman, Richard L. Palmer and Larry E. Trefrey, and against the Defaulted Defendant Bondex International, Inc. as follows:

Interest - $1,458.90.
Costs - $344.70, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,803.60.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
